app.name: YelpAPI Client
app.one_liner: A pure Python client for the Yelp Fusion API that provides simple, robust access with timeout controls.

screens.name: API Query Interface
screens.purpose: Allow developers to construct and execute Yelp Fusion API queries using a Pythonic interface.
primary_actions: Initialize YelpAPI client with API key

rust_commands.name: execute_search
rust_commands.purpose: Perform a search query against the Yelp Fusion API using provided parameters.

rust_commands.name: initialize_client
rust_commands.purpose: Create a new YelpAPI client instance with authentication and optional timeout settings.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for search_query and business_query methods
week 1: Implement core YelpAPI client with context manager
week 1: Write basic usage examples mirroring README
acceptance_tests: Client initializes successfully with valid API key and optional timeout
Search query returns structured results matching Yelp Fusion API schema
Timeout parameter prevents indefinite blocking during network failure
